hypothesis_en: Madam President, Madam Commissioner, this report will be voted on tomorrow at 11.30 a.m. This debate is closed and, in accordance with the agenda, we are proceeding to the debate on Mr Cercas' report on the regulation of working time.
reference_en: thank you very much Commissioner the vote on this item will be taken tomorrow as of eleven thirty the debate is closed on that item now on the agenda we move to the debate on the report by Mr Cercas Organisation of Working Time for the Committee on Employment and Social Affairs you have the floor rapporteur
source_es: muchas gracias señora Comisaria se procederá a la votación de este informe mañana a partir de las once horas treinta minutos queda cerrado este debate y de conformidad con el orden del día procedemos al debate del informe del Señor Cercas sobre la ordenación del tiempo de trabajo en nombre de la Comisión de Empleo y Asuntos Sociales tiene la palabra el señor ponente Señor Cercas
